facebook.caption: POV: you book a resort on Khem Beach and realize the photos actually undersold it. New World Phu Quoc Resort sits right on one of the island's cleanest stretches of sand. 4.7 stars across 5,503 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into New World Phu Quoc Resort for the first time. Khem Beach right outside. 5,503 people gave it 4.7 stars and you'll see exactly why in the next 30 seconds.
